_note: FIXTURE manifest for graph-alltypes. Each named component yields a `member-of` edge component->module. The `eval` module names the bundle, the skill, the agent and the reviewer; the `rules-common` module names the rule. Together with profiles.json (selects) and the bundle/agent/rule prose+frontmatter, this exercises every BR-DEP-001 edge type.

eval.description: Names the bundle + its frontmatter-pointed components (member-of edges).

rules-common.description: Names the rule the agent applies.
